task.title: Align the /brand page tokens with the actual site theme and refine dark-mode secondary buttons

events.content: Darkened the dark-mode primary button hover token to remove the washed-out hover state: Darkened the dark-mode primary button hover token to remove the washed-out hover state

raw.question: Darkened the dark-mode primary button hover token to remove the washed-out hover state
raw.chosen: Darkened the dark-mode primary button hover token to remove the washed-out hover state
raw.reasoning: The previous hover color was lighter and less saturated than the surrounding dark UI, so primary actions looked faded on hover. Using the stronger base brand blue restores contrast and intent without changing the default state.

retrospective.summary: Adjusted the dark-mode primary button hover token to a denser blue so hover states no longer look washed out.
